CustomField.description: Formula field: number of calendar days elapsed since nepa_last_stage_transition__c (or nepa_start_date__c if no transition recorded). Used by NEPA_Timeline_Risk_Assessor to determine risk tier.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Days elapsed in the current process stage. Recalculates daily.
CustomField.formula: IF( NOT(ISBLANK(nepa_last_stage_transition__c)), TODAY() - DATEVALUE(nepa_last_stage_transition__c), IF( NOT(ISBLANK(nepa_start_date__c)), TODAY() - nepa_start_date__c, 0 ) )
CustomField.label: Days in Current Stage
